backlog.title: Inject fix-it prompt on validation failure
backlog.rationale: Already scaffolded in _validation_followup; ensures the agent fixes broken code before moving on

backlog.title: Include git diff summary in auto-commit message body
backlog.rationale: Richer commit history – easier to review what each iteration changed

done.title: Truncate long bash tool output
done.rationale: Unbounded stdout/stderr can blow up context window
done.outcome: Added MAX_OUTPUT_CHARS=8000 cap with truncation notice in tools.py

done.title: Trim old chat messages to stay within token budget
done.rationale: Long chat sessions accumulate messages; dropping oldest pairs prevents context-window overflow
done.outcome: Added _trim_messages() + MAX_CHAT_MESSAGES=40 in clio.py; called after every chat turn

done.title: Stream assistant text tokens as they arrive
done.rationale: Users see nothing until full response arrives; streaming prints tokens live
done.outcome: _turn() now uses client.messages.stream(); text deltas printed with ANSI colour as they arrive; tool-use rounds handled the same way via get_final_message()

done.title: Auto-commit each validated improvement to 'agent' branch
done.rationale: User requested every improvement be committed to an 'agent' branch; provides clear history
done.outcome: Added AGENT_BRANCH constant, _auto_commit(iteration) helper, and wired it into _validation_followup(); also added failure-hint injection on non-zero exit
